H1.key_attack: k_Fenton wrong by 159x at pH 7; LIP static (July 2025); bio variables dominate by 100-fold

H2.key_attack: 15-LOX regioselectivity ≠ random Fenton; r>0.9 prediction guaranteed false; 80°C ferrihydrite unstable

H3.key_attack: pKa advantage disappears at serpentinization pH 10 (Sec/Cys ratio goes from 8.9x to 1.0x); prediction inverted

H4.key_attack: LIP non-expansion undermines dynamics framing; crowding error 2-5x; ferritin ≠ ferrihydrite kinetically

H5.key_attack: Free Fe3+ ≈ 10^-19 M at pH 7.4; total ratio ≠ active species ratio; universal claim compares incomparables

critic_questions: July 2025 LIP non-expansion: reformulate around iron COMPARTMENTALIZATION not cytosolic LIP dynamics
15-LOX regioselectivity: can non-specificity of abiotic Fenton be the FEATURE? Evolution selected 15-LOX for most destabilizing position
k_Fenton pH shift to ferryl/oxidoiron: does oxidant identity change PLOOH product distribution?
Ferritin as evolved containment of geochemical Fenton reactor — strongest surviving bridge
PHREEQC for speciation snapshots during GSH depletion, not LIP dynamics

key_counter_evidence.labile_iron_pool_static: PMC12236665, July 2025 — LIP does NOT expand during ferroptosis. Undermines H1, H4, H5.
key_counter_evidence.k_fenton_ph_mechanism_shift: RSC Dalton Trans 2022 — At pH >5, Fenton shifts from HO• to ferryl. k increases 159x from pH 3 to pH 7.
key_counter_evidence.selenocysteine_pka_inversion: At pH 10, both Sec and Cys fully deprotonated. Advantage collapses from 8.9x to 1.0x.
key_counter_evidence.15LOX_vs_fenton_regioselectivity: ALOX15 produces >95% 15-HPETE. Fenton-OH• attacks all 4 bis-allylic positions equally.
